title: datura stramonium var. inermis
intro: Datura stramonium var. inermis, also known as the prickly bittersweet angel, is a variety of the Datura stramonium plant, a perennial herb native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The medicinal properties of Datura stramonium var. inermis are attributed to its alkaloids, which can also exhibit analgesic and antipyretic effects, providing relief from pain and fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, although its usage should be cautious due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
